nasb.text: And just as He called and they would not listen, so they called and I would not listen,” says the Lord of hosts;

esv.text: “As I called, and they would not hear, so they called, and I would not hear,” says the Lord of hosts,

cnv.text: 我曾呼喚他們，他們不聽；照樣，將來他們呼求我，我也不聽。這是萬軍之耶和華說的。

ccb.text: 祂说，‘我曾呼唤他们，他们不听；将来他们呼求我，我也不听。
